message:
test(session+hostcall): add ExportSnapshot unit tests and loom/clippy fixes

Session tests:
- export_snapshot_captures_header_and_entries: verifies header fields and entry count match
- export_snapshot_does_not_include_internal_caches: confirms lightweight copy without autosave_queue/entry_index
- export_snapshot_html_matches_session_html: ensures snapshot HTML parity with Session::to_html()
- export_snapshot_empty_session: validates empty session produces valid HTML structure
- render_session_html_contains_header_info: checks session ID and cwd appear in rendered HTML
- render_session_html_renders_all_entry_types: covers message, model change, and thinking level entries
- export_snapshot_with_path: validates path propagation
- fork_plan_snapshot_consistency: ensures plan_fork entries are independent copies

Loom tests:
- Add explicit drop(queue) before loom iteration boundaries to prevent
  use-after-free false positives in loom's deterministic scheduler

QA tests:
- Replace manual if-panic with assert! macro for capture_baseline diagnosis
  validation (clippy::manual_assert)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
